PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR INSPECTION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE), AND TO DEEM ADMITTED THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS SPECIFIED IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS (SET ONE) IS GRANTED; NO OPPOSITION FILED. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE NOT AWARDED AS NONE WERE REQUESTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted
Off Calendar Jun-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S Motion motion to compel responses to plaintiff's special interrogatories (set one), defendant's request for inspection and production of documents (set one), and to deem admitted the truth of the matters specified in plaintiff's requests for admissions (set one) is granted; no opposition filed. Monetary sanctions are not awarded as none were requested. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.
